form.formComment: Comes here off a 31-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 13 at Turffontein Standside in LR on March 14 over 2400m, 8 len behind Daimyo with 54kg at $13.50. The run before that 2nd in a small field at Turffontein Inside on February 19 over 2600m, nose behind Bellerophon with 61.5kg at $3. Safely held last start but is capable of better.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 2nd of 7 at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 2400m, 1.5 len behind Damova carrying 58.5kg at $3.30. The start before that 3rd of 13 at this track on March 5 over 2000m, slow going 2.5 len behind Councillor with 61kg at $8. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: The Playboy Bomber directed outwards away from its heels leaving the 400m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up second last of 7 at Turffontein Inside on February 19 over 2000m, 7 len behind Kissing Machine with 54.5kg at $15. Second run from a spell won by 1.5 len at Turffontein Standside March 21 over 2400m defeating One More Star carrying 57kg at $17. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 12 at this track on March 26 over 2400m, on a slow track; 16 len behind Futurewolff with 60.5kg at $51. The race before that second last of 10 at this track on February 10 over 2400m, 8 len behind Copper Plate with 60kg at $11. Others read better. This will test.
